name: Slopodar
description: Voice distance meter for web text. No AI, no server, no model — just heuristics. Measures contractions, first-person rate, question rate, transition word density, nominalisation density, and structural rhetoric (epigram, isocolon, antithesis, anadiplosis, em-dash, abstract noun). No verdict, just numbers. * Previously called 'Slopodar — LLM slop detector.' Renamed: it contained more slop than science.
